name: Zombie Road - Crazy Driving Game
description: This world is occupied by zombies, now you will drive your car and escape from this city. But there are so many zombies on the road, you need to kill all of them. Don't forget to avoid those roadblocks when you are killing zombies, if you crash into them, you will die. Try to survive as long as you can, good luck in the game Zombie Road!
tags: Adventure, Avoid, Boy, Boys, Car, Cars, Driving, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, Obstacle, Zombie
